professions.title: Senior MarkLogic Architect
professions.description: The Senior MarkLogic Architect is responsible for the design, configuration, and ongoing optimisation of MarkLogic deployments in enterprise environments. This role requires deep knowledge of index architecture — range indexes, lexicons, TDE templates, and triple stores — as well as expertise in security models, temporal collections, and Optic query planning. In the llamaverse, this role is considered a prestige position, frequently cited in classified government briefings.
professions.secretPowerAdvantage: Druid's Sight — enables direct perception of index fragmentation
